name: Alaska Airlines

carryOn.notes: Saver fare allows one personal item only. Main Cabin and above include one carry-on and one personal item.

economy.notes: $30 for first bag. Free for MVP Gold and Gold 75K members.

batteryRules.lithiumIon: Spare batteries and power banks must be in carry-on only
batteryRules.spareBatteries: Carry-on only. Up to 100Wh unrestricted. 101–160Wh with airline approval. Over 160Wh prohibited.
batteryRules.laptops: Allowed in carry-on. Follow TSA guidelines.

restrictedItems: Smart bags with non-removable lithium batteries exceeding 160Wh

faqs.question: Does Alaska Airlines Saver fare include a carry-on?
faqs.answer: No. Alaska Airlines Saver fare passengers are limited to one personal item under the seat. A carry-on bag in the overhead bin is not included in the Saver fare price.

faqs.question: How much are Alaska Airlines checked baggage fees?
faqs.answer: The first checked bag is $30 and the second is $40 on most routes. Alaska Airlines MVP, MVP Gold, and Gold 75K members receive complimentary checked bags.

faqs.question: Can I bring a power bank on Alaska Airlines?
faqs.answer: Power banks must be carried in your carry-on bag — never in checked luggage. Up to 100Wh is unrestricted. Banks between 101–160Wh require airline approval before your flight.
